title: TNT Time
description: Displays time left to the TNT explosion.
body:
# TNTTime - Refabricated Displays time left to the TNT explosion above primed TNT. No complex configuration, lightweight mod that does a thing! ### Sup, 1.20 and 1.20.1 works fine! *Fabric API isn't required here.* Simply no dependencies. Known incopatibilities may be the ones that modify Minecraft's FontRenderer, EntityRenderer or DataTracker in harmful ways. ### Secrets - You can change the display of the text between color and non-color, by changing "Chat Colors" option. ## Images ## How it started? Legacy mod brought to the fresh Minecraft release! I made it because I thought that TNT jumping would be cool if I could have mod like this for FabricMC - which I didn't found. Code from here is based off https://github.com/Sk1erLLC/TNTTimer - it isn't stolen, it's my personal implementaion.

**I've spent over a week on testing and looking for gaps,** so I made simple mod for practice and viable port :)
